## What changed

Describe the user-visible and security-relevant changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run fuzz`
- [ ] I reviewed new or changed dependencies.
- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, generated binaries, or private report data.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior has tests or an explanation of why tests are impractical.

## Risk and rollback

Describe the primary failure mode and how to revert safely.
